14:32:01.250 db-pool-main INFO
Executing prepared statement 18ms
SELECT id, email, role, last_login
FROM users JOIN workspaces ON users.ws_id = workspaces.id
WHERE workspaces.tenant_id = 'tnt_prod_x9' AND users.status = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50;
